product: Inbound Private Link for performance-intensive services (Public Preview)
tagline: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services such as Zerobus Ingest and Lakebase Autoscaling is now in Public Preview.
what_it_does: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services such as Zerobus Ingest and Lakebase Autoscaling is now in Public Preview. This page shows how to configure PrivateLink for inbound connectivity to performance intensive services on the Databricks platform. This private connection allows external clients and users to access services on the Databricks platform, such as Zerobus Ingest and Lakebase Autoscaling.
why_it_matters: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services such as Zerobus Ingest and Lakebase Autoscaling is now in Public Preview.

key_takeaway: Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services such as Zerobus Ingest and Lakebase Autoscaling is now in Public Preview.
